---
title: "Dashboard Test Hub"
---

::: {style='display:flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center'}

[View The Latest Forecasts](forecast.html){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}

:::

This is a test dashboard for the hubverse dashboard pipeline. It is paired with the [dashboard-test-hub](https://github.com/hubverse-org/dashboard-test-hub) and used for development, testing, and CI validation.
